metadata.description: Curated plugins for AI-assisted work: UI/UX excellence, planning, and more.

plugins.name: ui-excellence
plugins.description: UI/UX foundations for web interfaces. v1.0.0-alpha.1 ships 4 skills: animation/motion, visual polish, web standards, and accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA). Upcoming alphas add typography, microinteractions, heuristic audits, CRO, and engagement loops.
